Download.title: Desktop Agent
Download.subtitle: Sync your Assetto Corsa automatically
Download.description: The Companion Agent runs in the background on your Windows PC and sends your sessions, personal bests, and car badges to Sim Racing Companion in real time.
Download.fileInfo: Windows 10/11 · x64 · ~50 MB · No installer needed

steps.title: How to set up
steps.one: Download and run SimRacingCompanion.exe — it appears in the system tray
steps.three: Sign in with your Sim Racing Companion account
steps.four: Done — your sessions will sync automatically

empty.title: No cars in your garage
empty.description: Sync your sessions to see your car stats.

edit.title: Rename Car
edit.hint: Visible only to you. Leave empty to use the original name.
